title: Spring Boot Admin Instance
description: A single registered Spring Boot application instance in Spring Boot Admin. Represents a running application that has registered itself with the Admin server and is being monitored.

id.description: Unique instance identifier assigned by the Admin server upon registration.

version.description: Optimistic locking version number, incremented on each state change.

registered.description: Whether this instance is currently registered and being monitored.

statusTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent status change.

info.description: Application metadata collected from the /info Actuator endpoint (build version, git commit, etc.).

endpoints.description: Actuator endpoints discovered for this instance.

buildVersion.description: Build version string from the /info Actuator endpoint, if available.

tags.description: Custom metadata tags for this instance.

ApplicationRegistration.title: Application Registration
ApplicationRegistration.description: The registration payload submitted by the Spring Boot application client.

name.description: Application name, typically the value of spring.application.name.

managementUrl.description: Base URL of the application's Actuator management endpoints.

healthUrl.description: Direct URL to the /health Actuator endpoint.

serviceUrl.description: Base URL of the application service for UI linking.

StatusInfo.title: Status Info
StatusInfo.description: Current status of the instance as determined by polling the health endpoint.

details.description: Component health details from the health endpoint response.

Endpoint.title: Actuator Endpoint
Endpoint.description: A single Actuator endpoint available on the instance.

id.description: Endpoint identifier (health, metrics, loggers, env, etc.).
